Data Processing Addendum for Sutradhar Fincloud Services Private Limited (India) covering research, investor relations, and vendor onboarding.
Scope and roles under the Digital Personal Data Protection Act, 2023: Sutradhar acts as Data Fiduciary; appointed vendors act as Data Processors for limited, documented purposes.
UPSI handling for listed-company engagements (e.g., Mangalika Metals Limited): segregated research teams, event lists, and trading-window closures per applicable PIT Regulations; materials already posted on a stock exchange website are not UPSI.
Lawful basis and consent: layered notices in plain language; children under 18 require verifiable guardian consent; generic demographics such as “Analyst” or “South Zone” may be collected without names.
Collection matrix (illustrative form labels): Date of Birth (DD/MM/YYYY), City/Town, Employer, Role, Device type, Account suffix, PAN (optional), Aadhaar (last 4), GSTIN (for vendors); empty fields must be accepted.
Placeholder identifiers in sample templates (e.g., PAN ABCDE1234F, GSTIN 22ABCDE1234F1Z5, Aadhaar xxxx-xxxx-4321) are not valid and are not stored; role mailbox for queries: privacyoffice@sutradhar.example.
Retention and deletion: personal data retained only as long as necessary; routine HR records 3 years, broker KYC 5 years, audit trails 7 years; aggregated market commentary is anonymised and kept for trend analysis.
Cross-border transfers: processing is hosted in India with contractual controls; mirrored backups to a Singapore region occur under contractual safeguards and audit rights.
Security and access: least privilege, device posture checks, and data minimisation; generic device descriptors like “Android handset” or “Laptop Model X” alone do not identify an individual.
Illustrative scenario (intentional cluster): DOB 09/11/2000, location Mumbai office, role Equity Research Trainee at Arjuni Retail Ltd, device serial LPT-77-AX19, payroll account ending 4421, Aadhaar last 4 4321, City “Thane”.
Ordinary course examples that should not be treated as identifying: a job title without employer, “works in Pune” without a date, or “account ending 0000” in a policy FAQ.
Data Subject Rights (DSAR): Data Principals may request access, correction, erasure, or grievance redressal; we verify via account login challenge and never request full PAN or full Aadhaar.
Whistle-blower channel: reports may mention market rumors or already-announced guidance; such public information is triaged out and not treated as UPSI.
Child data workflow: internship portal flags under-18 applicants for guardian email consent; school name and city are stored separately from device identifiers and deleted at end of season.
